---
title: "DeCiDe LAB"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO DASHBOARD EN -->
<div class="row mb-4 align-items-center bg-light p-4 rounded-3 border-start border-primary border-4 shadow-sm m-1">
    <div class="col-md-9">
        <h1 class="display-5 fw-bold text-dark mb-2">Decoding Cell Death in Disease</h1>
        <p class="lead text-secondary mb-0">
            Investigating the cellular, molecular, and genetic mechanisms of regulated cell death in human diseases.
        </p>
    </div>
    <div class="col-md-3 text-md-end mt-3 mt-md-0">
        <span class="badge badge-decide-green px-3 py-2 fs-6">Basic Science</span>
        <span class="badge badge-decide-blue px-3 py-2 fs-6 mt-1">Translational</span>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- METRICS CARDS EN -->
<div class="row g-4 mb-4">
    <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="card h-100 border-0 shadow-sm bg-white">
            <div class="card-body">
                <div class="d-flex align-items-center mb-3">
                    <div class="p-3 bg-opacity-10 bg-primary rounded-3 text-primary me-3">
                        <i class="bi bi-journal-medical fs-3"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0 fw-bold">Research Lines</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text text-muted small">Mapping apoptotic and necroptotic pathways in inflammatory and oncological pathologies.</p>
                <a href="pesquisa.qmd" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary w-100 mt-2">Explore Lines</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="card h-100 border-0 shadow-sm bg-white">
            <div class="card-body">
                <div class="d-flex align-items-center mb-3">
                    <div class="p-3 bg-opacity-10 bg-success rounded-3 text-success me-3">
                        <i class="bi bi-vial fs-3"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0 fw-bold">Courses</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text text-muted small">Hands-on workshops on computational molecular biology and in vitro experimental protocols.</p>
                <a href="cursos.qmd" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success w-100 mt-2">View Schedule</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="card h-100 border-0 shadow-sm bg-white">
            <div class="card-body">
                <div class="d-flex align-items-center mb-3">
                    <div class="p-3 bg-opacity-10 bg-warning rounded-3 text-dark me-3">
                        <i class="bi bi-bookmark-star fs-3"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0 fw-bold">About the Lab</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text text-muted small">Discover our infrastructure, institution, leadership and funding sources.</p>
                <a href="bio.qmd" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-warning w-100 text-dark mt-2">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```
